AVEMUJICA-PERFORM.description: Perform effects trigger if you have played the specified card types this turn.
AVEMUJICA-PERFORM.title: Perform
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.description: Adds the specified effect to the current [gold]Song[/gold]. If no effect is specified, choose a random effect to add. After [gold]Composing[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] times, add the [gold]Song[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.title: Compose
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.description: Summons a [gold]Doll[/gold]. [gold]Dolls[/gold] use their passive ability and lose [blue]1[/blue] HP at the end of your turn.
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.title: Awaken
AVEMUJICA-DOLL.title: Doll
AVEMUJICA-DREAMSPIN.description:
[gold]Dreamspin[/gold] targets yourself or a [gold]Doll[/gold].
Target yourself to [gold]Awaken[/gold] a [gold]Doll[/gold]. If all [gold]Dolls[/gold] are present, they gain [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
Target a [gold]Doll[/gold] to activate their [gold]Skill[/gold] and give them [blue]1[/blue] HP.
AVEMUJICA-DREAMSPIN.title: Dreamspin
